name: Dividends Received Deduction for CFC Stock Sales

eligibility.description: Applies to U.S. shareholders that are domestic corporations holding stock in a CFC that sells stock in another foreign corporation held for at least 1 year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: When a CFC sells stock in another foreign corporation, the portion of the gain treated as a dividend is eligible for a 100% dividends received deduction (DRD) under Section 245A for the U.S. shareholder.
